name: InjuryIntelligenceAgent
purpose: Scrapes Covers.com injury reports and calculates per-team health impact scores (0-100). Factors in player importance, injury severity, and historical impact on ATS performance.

name: LineMovementAgent
purpose: Compares opening lines to current lines across snapshots to detect sharp money (large moves on low volume) vs public money (gradual drift). Highest-weighted signal in the pipeline.

name: TrendsAgent
purpose: Evaluates ATS situational edges: home/away splits, rest days, back-to-back performance, division matchups, and momentum streaks over last 10/20 games.

name: StatsSignalAgent
purpose: Counts how many independent statistical edges agree on a pick direction. More edges aligned = stronger signal. Uses a voting system across offensive/defensive efficiency, pace, and matchup stats.

name: MLLearningAgent
purpose: Scikit-learn gradient boosting model that takes all other agent signals as input features. Trains on historical outcomes weighted by user accuracy (admin 65%, others 35%). Outputs a 0-1 confidence score.

name: ConsensusAgent
purpose: Final aggregator. Applies weighted sum of all agent scores, then caps adjustment to ±15% to prevent any single agent from dominating. Produces the pick recommendation and final confidence score.

name: NarrativeAgent
purpose: Generates human-readable ESPN-quality explanations of why a pick was made. Synthesizes all agent signals into a paragraph with key stats, edges, and reasoning. Never votes — output only.

name: InjuryMonitorAgent
purpose: Background daemon polling Covers.com every 30 minutes. Detects new injuries, status changes (out/doubtful/questionable), and late scratches. Triggers re-analysis when significant changes found.

name: LineWatchAgent
purpose: Captures line snapshots 4x/day from odds API. Stores historical movement data that LineMovementAgent uses to detect sharp vs public money patterns. Runs at 9 AM, 2 PM, 5 PM, 8 PM EST.

name: OrchestratorAgent
purpose: Pipeline coordinator. Loads game context, runs 4 analysis agents in parallel, waits for completion, then sequentially runs ML → Consensus → Narrative. Persists all signals to agent_signals table.

name: NimrodAgent
purpose: Reads finalized AI picks from the database, generates ~160KB bet slip images with WHY THIS PICK + KEY STATS + ALL EDGES sections, and drafts tweet text. Output used by Nimrod scheduler for social posting.

name: WatchdogSupervisor
purpose: Master process supervisor managing Flask + 4 daemons (InjuryMonitor, LineWatch, AutoResolve, DiscordListener) with auto-restart and exponential backoff. Health checks every 30s, alerts on repeated failures.

name: DiscordListener
purpose: Continuous 30s polling daemon for admin commands in Discord channel. Supports approve/deny picks, trigger nimrod, force resolve, and status check commands from authorized users.

name: DiscordPicksPoster
purpose: Posts rich embeds with bet slip images to Discord picks channel. Formats AI picks with confidence scores, key edges, and narrative summaries as Discord-native cards with thumbnails.

name: AutoPickFilter
purpose: ML-based pick selection for Henchmen auto-posting. Evaluates sport win rates, edge strength, and EV ranking to filter AI suggestions down to 4-7 picks per sport. Enforces $4/bet limit and max 9 total.

name: PickAnalysisAgent
purpose: Analyzes last 500 resolved picks to extract edge patterns, directional tendencies, and team performance trends. Builds BETTING_LEARNINGS.md which feeds back into pick selection decisions.

name: CompetitorMonitor
purpose: Weekly GitHub intelligence scan of Bortlesboat's repos, commit history, MCP registry updates, and new tool releases. Reports competitive changes to Discord.

name: MoltbookPublisher
purpose: Posts AI picks and results to Moltbook subreddits (m/edges, m/sportsbetting, m/predictions) via HenchmenAI account. Handles daily picks, results recaps, and expansion posts.

name: MorningBriefingAgent
purpose: Generates daily pre-work summary: today's game slate, overnight line movements, injury updates, Flask server health, and late West Coast results. Delivered to Discord at 7 AM EST.

name: EveningSummaryAgent
purpose: End-of-day results recap: win/loss breakdown by sport, profit/loss calculation, running record update, and alerts for any anomalies. Delivered to Discord at 11 PM EST.

name: DividendStalwartsScanner
purpose: Scans 44 dividend stocks + 6 dividend ETFs (SCHD, VYM, HDV, DVY, SPYD, NOBL). Composite scoring on dividend yield, sustainability, and growth rate. Outputs buy/hold/watch recommendations.

name: EmergingTechScanner
purpose: Scans 40+ tech stocks (NVDA, AMD, MSFT, AMZN, GOOGL, META, AI, PLTR) + tech ETFs (SMH, SOXX, QQQ, ARKK, XLK). Growth metrics, sector positioning, and innovation scoring.

name: HiddenGemsScanner
purpose: Value stock scanner for 15 undervalued small/mid-caps (TROW, FAST, PAYX, CINF, AFL, SNA). Scores on P/E, PEG ratio, dividend yield, profit margin, and debt-to-equity. Strong Buy ≥ 85.

name: MutualFundScanner
purpose: Scans 12 top mutual funds (FXAIX, FSKAX, VFIAX, VTSAX, SWPPX, FBALX). Multi-factor scoring: expense ratio (40%), performance proxy (30%), quality metrics (30%).

name: HYSAAlternativeScanner
purpose: Scans 10 money market and T-bill ETFs (BIL, SHV, SGOV, USFR, FLRN, NEAR, ICSH, JPST, MINT, GSY) for yield, stability, and liquidity. Cash alternative recommender.

name: MonteCarloEngine
purpose: Runs 10,000+ stochastic simulation paths using log-normal return distributions. Projects portfolio value at 5th/25th/50th/75th/95th percentiles. Supports contributions and withdrawals over custom time horizons.

name: PortfolioOptimizer
purpose: Markowitz efficient frontier optimization via PyPortfolioOpt. Computes max Sharpe ratio portfolio, min volatility portfolio, and 5,000 random frontier portfolios for visualization.

name: RiskMetricsAnalyzer
purpose: Calculates Sharpe, Sortino, Treynor ratios, Beta, Alpha, Value at Risk (VaR 95%), Conditional VaR, maximum drawdown, drawdown duration, and Calmar ratio for any portfolio.

name: DividendValuationEngine
purpose: Gordon Growth Model (DDM) valuation: fair value = D1 / (r - g). Calculates dividend growth rate from 1yr/3yr averages, payout ratio sustainability, and undervalued/overvalued verdict.

name: PortfolioHealthChecker
purpose: Monitors portfolio for concentration risk (>25-40% single holding), diversification gaps, sector allocation issues, and rebalancing needs. Scores 0-100 with critical/warning/insight alerts.

name: ProactiveInvestmentAdvisor
purpose: Rule-based recommendation engine. Calculates financial health score, determines strategy (conservative/moderate/aggressive), runs parallel scanners, filters owned tickers, ranks top 8 picks with contextual reasoning. 30-min cache TTL.

name: FinancialHealthScorer
purpose: Composite 5-factor wellness score: spending discipline (20%), savings rate (25%), investment contribution (20%), debt health (15%), net worth growth (20%). Rates Excellent/Good/Fair/Needs Attention.
